title: White Satin with Royal Blue Snowflakes Wired Christmas Ribbon- 2.5 Inch x 10 Yards x 1Roll
features: A MUST-HAVE FOR DECORATION: Don't miss it if you're choosing a gift wrap ribbon for your decoration! Our faux jute wired ribbon works perfectly for decorating and adding finishing touch to your craft projects. Simple and elegant, our craft ribbon adds a ‘natural’ feel as a gift.

GREAT WORKMANSHIP: Our gift wrapping christmas ribbon has a density weave so you won’t find any loose edges. You won’t find any fraying ends or loose strings anywhere, making our snowflakes ribbon perfect for high-end and professional DIY works and Crafts.

EASY TO USE: The 10-yard long ribbon is enough for all the decorating and accenting your DIY Crafts. The ribbon for gift wrapping is easy to use and won’t tangle. It can be tied or glued on gift packages and DIY craft projects.

SIMPLE YET ELEGANT: Fond of minimalistic decor? There is nothing that can accent your Craft better than our ribbon for crafts. This ribbon matches any type of gift wrapping paper and it looks great on plain or brown gift wrapping paper.

MATERIAL USED: Our craft ribbon is made of high-quality polyester which is soft and durable. As these ribbons for crafts are reusable and plastic-free, they are an eco-friendly and sustainable option compared to plastic ribbons.
description: Decorate & Accent Your Craft Projects With CT CRAFT LLC Snowflakes Christmas Wired Ribbon. Tired of glittery and shimmery wrapping papers and looking for craft supply which along with your DIYs can be used for decorative purposes? Want to add some elegance to your gifts wraps? Our beautifully designed color ribbons for crafts will instantly add a creative flair and natural look to your gift wrapping and other DIY decorating jobs. This gift wrap ribbon for Crafts is meticulously crafted from premium quality material which makes them soft and moldable yet durable. The tight weave makes sure there are no loose strings, making them perfect for high-end gift wrapping. Features: Beautiful: Nice flow line looking makes the decoration more impressive. Versatile: Suitable for any decorative items like gifts, books, or even house decoration! Flexible: Molds nicely and does not stay stiff. No tangles. Easy to fold. Eco Friendly: Made of material which is biodegradable and safe for the planet. Premium Quality: No loose ends or strings. Affordable: Premium yet value for money product. Wide Uses: Gift wrapping Gift basket decorating DIY creative projects Cardmaking Sewing projects Dressmaking Scrapbooks Patchworks Wedding decors Home and office decor Christmas decoration
